title: Parameter Underflow causes: More than a 8k bit replication is probably wrong: 4294967295

features.name: replication count from parameter underflow
features.description: Code should include a replication operator where the count expression is derived from a parameter subtraction that underflows when the parameter equals zero

features.name: dead code branch with underflowing replication
features.description: Code should include a conditional if-else where the condition is true for zero, making the else branch dead code that contains a replication with an underflowing count

features.name: concatenation with large replication count
features.description: Code should include a concatenation containing a replication with a count that evaluates to a very large value (2^32-1) due to unsigned interpretation of -1
